batch_objective: US-001 — MAC View <-> A2L Explorer layout parity. The MAC hex pane adopts A2L Explorer's proportional 3fr:4fr (or equivalent) model, replacing the increment-6 fixed width:82 / 35%-narrow regime, with the same responsive behavior at <120 and >=120 columns. TUI/CSS-only — no parser/engine/model changes. US-002..US-005 refined and deferred to batch-07+.

artifacts.2-status: approved (re-confirmed: 2/2 blockers + 4/4 majors + 4/4 minors closed in 1 iteration)

batch_layout: Each batch archived under .dev-flow/<YYYY-MM-DD>-batch-NN/. Living docs (REQUIREMENTS.md, tests/, docs/diagrams/) kept current. On batch advance, the closing batch's state.json is snapshotted into its folder as state-snapshot-at-close.json before the shared state.json is trimmed to the new batch.

decisions_log.notes: Batch-05 (hex-viewer UX correctness) closed: all 6 phases complete, committed a222907, PR #8 merged to main (1f9a81e), synced to Obsidian G: vault. Full batch-05 decision history snapshotted to .dev-flow/2026-05-26-batch-05/state-snapshot-at-close.json. Carryover note: CI tui-ci.yml triggers on PRs to main-tui, not main, so the Python 3.11 gate did not run on the main-targeted PR; local validation is the de-facto gate.

Operator refined 5 user stories (US-001..US-005) and ran /dev-flow-init. Two refinement decisions locked: (1) US-002 retires the cfdx/.cdfx parameter flow in favor of a single JSON hex-first change system (ASAM .cdfx export dropped); (2) batching = batch-06 carries US-001 only (MAC/A2L layout parity, TUI/CSS-only quick win), batch-07 carries US-002..US-005 as an interconnected feature set (single-JSON change system, declarative check files, project report, multi-S19 variants). batch-06 scaffolded under .dev-flow/2026-06-09-batch-06/ following the project subfolder convention (not the generic skill template layout). 01-requirements.md seeded: §1-2 populated for US-001, §2.6 carries all 5 stories with deferral status, grep-verified anchors listed for phase-1 LLR drafting (styles.tcss:233-262 A2L, :264-304 MAC). Worktree: .claude/worktrees/sweet-yonath-bd8bd2 off main.

Phase 1 executed. architect + qa-reviewer dispatched in parallel; both read styles.tcss/app.py/batch-05 reqs/test_tui_mac_layout.py and converged: MAC adopts A2L's flat 4fr:3fr (records:hex), drop the width-narrow two-regime, CSS-only (app.py untouched — _compose_screen_mac structurally identical to _compose_screen_a2l). Both independently escalated ONE ambiguity: strict A2L parity drops MAC hex to ~49 cells at 120 cols (narrower than today's 82 → would regress the operator's complaint). Operator decision: proportional + min-width:82 FLOOR (hex = max(82, 3/7·body)) — grows like A2L AND never truncates a full row. 01-requirements.md filled: 1 HLR / 6 LLR / 7 TC-IDs + TC-021' re-band. 0 'should' in HLR/LLR statements (grep-verified). All named symbols carry grep-verified file:line (§6.4); min-width:82 flagged NEW; Textual min-width-over-fr flagged assumed-verify-Phase-3. Supersedes R-TUI-039. Two batch-05 fixed-82 tests flagged for rewrite. Phase 1 approved at gate by operator.
Phase 1 approved by operator ('Aprobar'). Layout model locked: proportional 4fr:3fr + min-width:82 floor. Advanced to Phase 2.

Phase 2 cross-review (architect + qa-reviewer + security-reviewer in parallel, all against live code). 2 blockers / 4 majors / 4 minors / 0 security. DESIGN sound and CONFIRMED: Textual min-width-over-fr clamp empirically verified working; all styles.tcss/app.py file:line anchors byte-accurate; shall/should clean; symbol-citation clean; security CLEAN (OK to ship, no surface). BLOCKERS (both found independently by architect+qa): B-1 body_w is term-24 at >=120 cols (rail shown), NOT term-6 — doc's predicted cell counts wrong (120->body 96 not 114; records=14 not 32; floor->prop transition ~216 term cols not 191). B-2 superseded-test inventory missed test_tc021_mac_two_panes_proportional_regime (directionb.py:1399) which still asserts 35% regime and will fail; doc also wrongly lists test_mac_hex_pane_width_at_wide_terminal:82 as must-fix (it survives). MAJORS: M-1 floor pins MAC hex at 82 for 120-215 cols; M-2 TC-005 continuity rationale false; M-3 starvation bounds wrong; M-4 pin TC-021'. Per dev-flow rule, blockers forced Phase-1 iteration.

Operator gate decisions: keep floor=82 (M-1 tradeoff accepted) + iterate-and-correct. Orchestrator applied all 9 fixes to 01-requirements.md directly (mechanical doc-correction using reviewers' exact measured numbers — no redesign): B-1 body_w=term-24(>=120)/term-6(<120) propagated through §1.3/§2.5/HLR/LLR-001.3/LLR-001.5/§6.3 (120->96, records=14, transition ~216); B-2 corrected test disposition (:139 rewrite, :1399 rewrite [the missed one], :1355 re-band, :82/:102/:171/:1438 survive); M-2 LLR-001.4 reframed (TC-005 = floor-holds-across-breakpoint, not no-fr-jump; residual body discontinuity = rail's, out of scope); M-3 starvation recomputed (records=body-82, >=1 at term>=107 rail/>=89 no-rail); M-4 TC-021' pinned to directionb.py:1355 band :1389; m-1 MAC-comment inspection criterion added (comment stale, says width:40); m-2 byte-diff authoritative; m-4 min-width-over-fr downgraded assumed->confirmed. Self-verified: 0 should/shall mixed-modal, 0 stale numbers. Phase-2 re-confirmation appended to 02-review.md: 2/2 blockers + 4/4 majors + 4/4 minors CLOSED in 1 iteration. Now 1 HLR / 6 LLR / 7 TC + TC-021'. Awaiting Phase-2 gate.

Phase-2 re-confirmation gate approved by operator ('Apruebo, avanza'). All 10 findings closed. Advancing to Phase 3 — single increment expected (CSS-only: styles.tcss + tests/test_tui_mac_layout.py + tests/test_tui_directionb.py, 3 files, under 5-file budget).

Phase 3 Increment 1 — US-001 full scope: LLR-001.1 (#mac_hex_pane 3fr), LLR-001.2 (#mac_records_pane 4fr), LLR-001.3 (min-width:82 floor), LLR-001.4 (delete width-narrow #mac_* blocks), LLR-001.5 (records>=1 invariant), LLR-001.6 (diff confinement + comment update). TC-002..TC-007 + TC-021' re-band + 2 superseded-test rewrites (:139, :1399). software-dev dispatched.

Increment 1 implemented + orchestrator-verified. 3 files (styles.tcss, test_tui_mac_layout.py, test_tui_directionb.py). CSS exactly per §6.2: records 4fr, hex 3fr+min-width:82, width-narrow #mac_* deleted, MAC comment rewritten. Tests: 4 new (TC-002/003/004/005), :139 deleted (TC-005 replacement per spec), :1399 re-purposed as test_tc021_mac_two_panes_floor_below_minimum, TC-021' re-banded 80-86. Results: targeted 108 passed; lean 775 passed / 0 failed / 29 skipped / 3 xfailed (vs batch-05 772 = +3 net, consistent with 4 new - 1 deleted). A2L byte-identical (0 a2l lines in diff); app.py/parsers/engine 0 changes; grep width-narrow #mac = 0; 0 stale tokens in MAC region. 0 spec deviations. Review packet: 03-increments/increment-001.md. Awaiting increment gate.

Increment 1 approved by operator ('aprobar, avanza'). Phase 3 complete in a single increment — all 6 LLRs covered. Advancing to Phase 4 validation: qa-reviewer executes the §5.2 TC matrix + inspections, fills 04-validation.md.

Phase 4 Validation. qa-reviewer dispatched: per-requirement pass/fail against §5.2 (TC-001..TC-007 + TC-021'), inspection items (git diff confinement, A2L byte-identity, MAC comment staleness, width-narrow grep), slow-marker suite, evidence capture.

Phase 4 PASS (no notes-level fails). qa-reviewer executed all targeted TCs + inspections; orchestrator independently re-ran the full suites. Evidence: TC-001 roll-up 108 passed; per-TC 7 passed; a2l guard 8 passed/93 deselected; lean 775 passed/0 failed/29 skipped/3 xfailed (pre-existing) in 174.64s; slow 19 passed in 523.59s. All 6 §5.3 acceptance criteria met: 100% LLR coverage, 0 regressions, superseded tests resolved (0 asserting retired contract), A2L byte-identical + guard green, diff confined (engine/app.py 0 lines), no snapshot baselines touched. Caveat: local Python 3.14.4 — CI 3.11 authoritative but tui-ci only triggers on main-tui PRs (de-facto gate = local, same as batches 1-5). 04-validation.md written. Awaiting Phase-4 gate.
Phase 4 gate approved by operator ('aprobado, sigue'). Advancing to Phase 5 post-mortem (architect + qa-reviewer co-author).
Phase 5 post-mortem. architect (process/metrics/root-causes/lessons) + qa-reviewer (validation retrospective) dispatched in parallel; orchestrator merges into 05-postmortem.md.

Phase 5 post-mortem co-authored (architect §1-5/7-8, qa-reviewer §6) and merged. Metrics: 6 total phase-iterations (P1=2 forced by P2 blockers); 10/10 findings closed in one iteration; 0 security; 1 increment / 3 files / 0 deviations; tests 4 added / 1 deleted / 1 re-purposed / 1 re-banded (772->775); 6/6 acceptance criteria; phases 0-4 in 1 calendar day. Key lesson: symbol-citation rule (batch-05 control) worked — 0 symbol defects — but could not catch B-1 because it checks EXISTENCE not VALIDITY CONDITIONS; a narrow-regime body_w measurement generalized across the regime boundary corrupted 1 blocker + 2 majors of derived numbers. Proposed preventive control: environmental-measurement citation rule (value + WHERE measured + REGIME under which it holds; derived numbers inherit the flag; 2 new Phase-2 blocker classes). qa standing rules: tests measure parent live / docs carry constants with method; test-disposition tables must be MEASURED not inferred (B-2 lesson, applies to batch-07 cfdx retirement). 9 action items incl. A-1 adopt env-measurement rule into template, A-3 fix tui-ci trigger gap (recurring since batch-05), A-9 knee-point test (LOW). Awaiting Phase-5 gate.

Phase 5 approved by operator ('Apruebo fase 5, sigue con la 6'). A-1 (env-measurement rule into template) and A-3 (tui-ci trigger fix) offered but not yet confirmed — left pending, NOT executed (scope discipline). Advancing to Phase 6.

Phase 6 Documentation. 3 parallel agents on disjoint files: (A) docs-writer updates living REQUIREMENTS.md R-TUI-039 to proportional+floor (action A-2; grouping/traceability preserved); (B) docs-writer writes 06-docs/traceability-matrix.md + functionality.md + diagrams/; (C) presentation-builder writes 06-docs/executive-summary.md.

Phase 6 complete. (A) REQUIREMENTS.md: R-TUI-039 rewritten in place to proportional+floor with supersession note + 9 explicit test names; 2 stale cross-refs reconciled (R-TUI-023 two-regime scope now Workspace-only; R-TUI-037 closing sentence updated); R-ID count 84 before = 84 after (orchestrator-verified), 0 renumbered/reordered; diff 21 lines / 3 entries. (B) 06-docs: traceability-matrix.md (9 rows, 0 gaps, file:line grep-verified post-increment incl. shifted anchors styles.tcss:283/288/289, 2 documented non-gaps: ~216-col knee LOW + CI-trigger gap), functionality.md (before/after width table 120/160/250), diagrams/mac-layout-model.md (Mermaid width-resolution flow with 3 measured sample points). (C) executive-summary.md (Context->Problem->Solution->Results->Next Steps, non-technical). A-2 closed. Pending operator decisions at gate: A-1 (env-measurement rule into req template) + A-3 (tui-ci trigger fix) still unconfirmed. Awaiting Phase-6 gate; on approval state -> awaiting-sync, then commit/PR/review/merge (pre-authorized) + /dev-flow-sync reminder.

Phase 6 gate approved by operator ('apruebo'). Batch-06 closed; all 6 phases complete. State -> awaiting-sync. A-1 (env-measurement rule into req template) and A-3 (tui-ci trigger fix) remain UNCONFIRMED by operator after two asks — not executed, carried as open action items. Proceeding with pre-authorized commit/push/PR/review/merge; obsidian_synced stays false until /dev-flow-sync runs post-merge.
